title: fetch_session: four repeated empty-url guards — extract helper
description: client.rs:89-100 has four nearly identical if-empty blocks for api_url, event_source_url, upload_url, download_url. The repetition obscures the intent and will drift if a new URL field is added. Rewrite: a local closure or macro: let require_non_empty = |field: &str, name: &str| { if field.is_empty() { Err(ClientError::InvalidSession(name)) } else { Ok(()) } }; then call it for each field.
